site.title: Galaxy Server
site.subtitle: [KOR_PVE] SCUM Official Server · Since 2021
site.description: Post-apocalyptic PVE community server for veterans and newcomers

home.title: Galaxy PVE Server
home.description: A wiki-style SCUM playbook for new and returning players on the Korean Galaxy PvE server, keeping the required English Galaxy identity visible while covering current patches, recommended stats, and server rules.
home.discordNewTab: Discord opens in a new tab
home.recommendedStartTitle: Start with STR3 · CON3 · DEX3 · INT3

newcomer.title: NEWCOMER GUIDE
newcomer.subtitle: Essential information for new players joining SCUM and Galaxy Server
newcomer.lead: A starter walkthrough built so first-time SCUM players and newcomers to Galaxy Server don't miss the first survival loop.
newcomer.survivalDesc: Character creation, securing water and food, and finding your first shelter, step by step.
newcomer.welcomePackDesc: How new players can claim the starter items they need for early survival.
newcomer.newbieCareDesc: Server onboarding, basic rules, and early movement routes, covered through Discord support.
newcomer.step1: Create your character and join the server.
newcomer.step2: Check your welcome pack and basic survival items.
newcomer.step3: Leave questions and support requests on Discord.

serverInfo.title: GALAXY SERVER INFO
serverInfo.subtitle: Review Galaxy PvE server rules, newcomer support, looting rotation policy, and current SCUM server-setting changes in one place.
serverInfo.rulesDesc: Rules and policies for PVE server
serverInfo.pveDesc: A cooperative server where bases, flags, vehicles, and items are protected from player intrusion.
serverInfo.squadPolicyDesc: One flag per squad and a maximum of seven squad members.
serverInfo.vehicleCareDesc: Vehicles must be started and moved every 10 days; unattended trader parking is forbidden.
serverInfo.discordCardDesc: Welcome packs, returning support, vehicle support, and PvP-intended player matching are handled through Discord.
serverInfo.serverIpDesc: Use this address in the SCUM server list or direct connection flow.

wiki.title: SCUM Wiki Hub
wiki.description: Pages, categories, and images pulled from the official SCUM Wiki API, organized so you can find what you need inside Galaxy Server without leaving the app. This isn't a full copy of the source wiki — it's built for quick lookup and scanning.
